description.en: Upload a video to TikTok as a draft. The user receives a notification to edit and publish it from TikTok.
description.de: Lade ein Video als Entwurf auf TikTok hoch. Der Benutzer erhält eine Benachrichtigung, um es in TikTok zu bearbeiten und zu veröffentlichen.
description.es: Upload a video to TikTok as a draft. The user receives a notification to edit and publish it from TikTok.
description.fr: Upload a video to TikTok as a draft. The user receives a notification to edit and publish it from TikTok.
description.ro: Upload a video to TikTok as a draft. The user receives a notification to edit and publish it from TikTok.
description.it: Upload a video to TikTok as a draft. The user receives a notification to edit and publish it from TikTok.

vars.ACCESS_TOKEN: env:TIKTOK_ACCESS_TOKEN|TikTok user access token with video.upload scope.

inputs.name: Title

description.en: Video caption with hashtags and mentions.
description.es: Video caption with hashtags and mentions.
description.fr: Video caption with hashtags and mentions.
description.ro: Video caption with hashtags and mentions.
description.it: Video caption with hashtags and mentions.

inputs.bot: The video title/caption. Can include hashtags and @mentions.

inputs.name: Video URL

description.en: Public URL of the video file.
description.es: Public URL of the video file.
description.fr: Public URL of the video file.
description.ro: Public URL of the video file.
description.it: Public URL of the video file.

inputs.bot: A publicly accessible URL to the video file to upload.

success.en: Video uploaded as draft (ID: {{PUBLISH_ID}}). Check TikTok to edit and publish.
success.de: Video als Entwurf hochgeladen (ID: {{PUBLISH_ID}}). Öffne TikTok zum Bearbeiten und Veröffentlichen.
success.es: Video uploaded as draft (ID: {{PUBLISH_ID}}). Check TikTok to edit and publish.
success.fr: Video uploaded as draft (ID: {{PUBLISH_ID}}). Check TikTok to edit and publish.
success.ro: Video uploaded as draft (ID: {{PUBLISH_ID}}). Check TikTok to edit and publish.
success.it: Video uploaded as draft (ID: {{PUBLISH_ID}}). Check TikTok to edit and publish.
